title: Enderman999517's Simple NVG
description: A small mod that adds night vision goggles
body:
**A simple mod that adds one item, the night vision goggles!**

**Craft as shown below:**
![Left-Right, Top-Bottom: iron ingot, string, iron ingot, eye of ender, amethyst shard, eye of ender](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6f3f6a72cc1cd0a5f557324f4e455255ac5f755.png)

**Usage:**
Toggle the night vision with 'N' by default however this can be changed in the keybinds. Be careful not to toggle it at day as it can get quite bright.

**Notes:**
- Uses Satin [https://github.com/Ladysnake/Satin](https://github.com/Ladysnake/Satin) however this does not need to be downloaded
